SNP Analysis in R

Zoe Sirotiak

2026-03-06

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = TRUE,
    message = TRUE,
    warning = TRUE
)

Data inspection and processing

rm(list = ls())
library(tidyverse)
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.2.0     ✔ readr     2.2.0
## ✔ forcats   1.0.1     ✔ stringr   1.6.0
## ✔ ggplot2   4.0.2     ✔ tibble    3.3.1
## ✔ lubridate 1.9.5     ✔ tidyr     1.3.2
## ✔ purrr     1.2.1     
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
## ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
# Giving paths to data
geno_path <- "fang_et_al_genotypes.txt"
pos_path  <- "snp_position.txt"

# Reading data
geno <- readr:: read_tsv(geno_path)
## Rows: 2782 Columns: 986
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: "\t"
## chr (986): Sample_ID, JG_OTU, Group, abph1.20, abph1.22, ae1.3, ae1.4, ae1.5...
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
pos <- readr:: read_tsv(pos_path)
## Rows: 983 Columns: 15
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: "\t"
## chr (9): SNP_ID, Chromosome, Position, alt_pos, mult_positions, amplicon, cd...
## dbl (6): cdv_marker_id, Genaissance_daa_id, Sequenom_daa_id, count_amplicons...
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
# Keeping only necessary columns
pos2 <- pos %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    SNP_ID     = as.character(.data$SNP_ID),
    Chromosome = suppressWarnings(as.integer(.data$Chromosome)),
    Position   = suppressWarnings(as.integer(.data$Position))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Chromosome), Chromosome %in% 1:10, !is.na(Position))

# Pivot genotype data to long format
geno_long <- geno %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(Sample_ID, JG_OTU, Group),
    names_to  = "SNP_ID",
    values_to = "Genotype"
  ) %>%
  mutate(SNP_ID = as.character(SNP_ID))

# Join genotype calls to SNP positions
geno_pos_long <- geno_long %>%
  inner_join(pos2, by = "SNP_ID")

# Splitting maize and teosinte files
maize_groups    <- c("ZMMIL", "ZMMLR", "ZMMMR")
teosinte_groups <- c("ZMPBA", "ZMPIL", "ZMPJA")

maize_long <- geno_pos_long %>% filter(Group %in% maize_groups)
teo_long   <- geno_pos_long %>% filter(Group %in% teosinte_groups)

# Creaing output folders
dir.create("output/maize/inc", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("output/maize/dec", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("output/teosinte/inc", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("output/teosinte/dec", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Build wide chr table with required column order
make_chr_wide <- function(dat_long, chr_num, decreasing = FALSE, missing_symbol = "?") {
  
  dat_long %>%
    filter(Chromosome == chr_num) %>%
    select(SNP_ID, Chromosome, Position, Sample_ID, Genotype) %>%
    mutate(
      Genotype = if_else(is.na(Genotype) | Genotype == "" | Genotype == "NA" | Genotype == "?/?",
                         missing_symbol, Genotype)
    ) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from  = Sample_ID,
      values_from = Genotype
    ) %>%
    arrange(if (decreasing) desc(Position) else Position)
}

# Write 20 files for a taxa: 10 inc (? for missing), 10 dec (- for missing)
write_taxa_files <- function(dat_long, base_dir) {
  
  lapply(1:10, function(chr) {
    out <- make_chr_wide(dat_long, chr, decreasing = FALSE, missing_symbol = "?")
    readr::write_tsv(out, file.path(base_dir, "inc", paste0("chr", chr, "_inc.tsv")))
  })
  
  lapply(1:10, function(chr) {
    out <- make_chr_wide(dat_long, chr, decreasing = TRUE, missing_symbol = "-")
    readr::write_tsv(out, file.path(base_dir, "dec", paste0("chr", chr, "_dec.tsv")))
  })
  
  invisible(TRUE)
}

# Produce all 40 files, 20 each
write_taxa_files(maize_long, "output/maize")
write_taxa_files(teo_long,   "output/teosinte")

# Checking files
all_out <- list.files("output", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "\\.tsv$")
length(all_out)
## [1] 40
check_one <- function(path, decreasing_expected = FALSE) {
  x <- readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  stopifnot(identical(names(x)[1:3], c("SNP_ID", "Chromosome", "Position")))
  if (decreasing_expected) {
    stopifnot(all(diff(x$Position) <= 0))
  } else {
    stopifnot(all(diff(x$Position) >= 0))
  }
  TRUE
}

# Checking one file for each
check_one("output/maize/inc/chr1_inc.tsv", decreasing_expected = FALSE)
## [1] TRUE
check_one("output/maize/dec/chr1_dec.tsv", decreasing_expected = TRUE)
## [1] TRUE

Part II: Visualization

# Creating histogram
snp_counts <- geno_pos_long %>%
  distinct(SNP_ID, Chromosome) %>%
  count(Chromosome)

ggplot(snp_counts, aes(x = factor(Chromosome), y = n)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "SNP markers per chromosome (overall)",
       x = "Chromosome", y = "# SNP markers")

# SNP markers per chromosome
snp_counts_taxa <- bind_rows(
  maize_long %>% mutate(Taxa = "Maize"),
  teo_long   %>% mutate(Taxa = "Teosinte")
) %>%
  distinct(Taxa, SNP_ID, Chromosome) %>%
  count(Taxa, Chromosome)

ggplot(snp_counts_taxa, aes(x = factor(Chromosome), y = n, fill = Taxa)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "SNP markers per chromosome: Maize vs Teosinte",
       x = "Chromosome", y = "# SNP markers")

# Polymorphic SNPs per chromosome
polymorphic_chr <- bind_rows(
  maize_long %>% mutate(Taxa="Maize"),
  teo_long %>% mutate(Taxa="Teosinte")
) %>%
  filter(Genotype != "?/?") %>%
  group_by(Taxa, Chromosome, SNP_ID) %>%
  summarize(n_genotypes = n_distinct(Genotype), .groups="drop") %>%
  filter(n_genotypes > 1) %>%
  count(Taxa, Chromosome)

ggplot(polymorphic_chr,
       aes(x=factor(Chromosome), y=n, fill=Taxa)) +
  geom_col(position="dodge") +
  labs(title="Polymorphic SNPs per chromosome",
       x="Chromosome",
       y="# polymorphic SNPs")

#Classifying by genotype
classify_site <- function(g) {
  if (is.na(g) || g == "" || g == "NA" || g == "?/?") return("Missing")
  
  parts <- strsplit(g, "/", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
  
  if (parts[1] == parts[2]) {
    "Homozygous"
  } else {
    "Heterozygous"
  }
}

geno_pos_long2 <- geno_pos_long %>%
  mutate(SiteClass = vapply(Genotype, classify_site, character(1)))
# Genotype proportion plots

ggplot(geno_pos_long2,
       aes(x = Sample_ID, fill = SiteClass)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  facet_wrap(~ Group, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of genotype classes per sample",
    x = "Sample",
    y = "Proportion"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))

# Proportions by group plot
group_props <- geno_pos_long2 %>%
  count(Group, SiteClass)

ggplot(group_props,
       aes(x = Group, fill = SiteClass, y = n)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity") +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of genotype classes by population group",
    x = "Group",
    y = "Proportion"
  )
